---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to guidelines, skills, or tooling
title: ""
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Who benefits (maintainers, kit users, a specific stack)?

## Proposed change

Describe what you want added or changed.

## Area

Check one or more:

- [ ] Guideline (`docs/guidelines/`)
- [ ] Core skill (`stack-detection`, `stack-loader`, `testing-universal`)
- [ ] Stack skill / `profile.yaml` (`skills/stacks/<id>/`)
- [ ] Registry / detection (`registry/stacks.yaml`)
- [ ] Install or tool adapter (`install.sh`, `AGENTS.md`, Cursor/Codex/Antigravity)
- [ ] CI or scripts (`scripts/kit`, validate, deploy-skills)
- [ ] Other

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches you thought about.

## Additional context

Examples, links to official docs, or draft wording.
